channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Dow Logs Worst Day Since March, S&P 500 And Nasdaq Snap Win Streak After US-Iran Exchange Fire — SNDK, TSLA, GOOGL, META, IREN In Focus
item.description: Iran's paramilitary Revolutionary Guard said it had targeted the headquarters of the US Navy's 5th Fleet in Bahrain, derailing US-Iran ceasefire talks.

item.title: SpaceX or Tesla: What Will Be the Better Buy on June 12?
item.description: SpaceX stock is expected to begin trading by the end of next week.

item.title: Tesla Expands Unsupervised Robotaxi Service To Whole Austin Metro Area
item.description: There’s been some criticism of Tesla’s limited and not entirely perfect robotaxi service in Austin — not to mention the fact that Elon Musk said they’d have robotaxis covering at least 50% of the US population by the end of 2025 … and we’re now almost halfway through 2026. However, ... [continu...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Pricing At $135 Per Share Will Value The Rocket Maker At $1.77 Trillion — Musk To Keep Ironclad Control
item.description: SpaceX is launching the largest U.S. IPO in history by pricing shares at $135, raising $75 billion to fuel rockets, Starlink and AI, while valuing the company at $1.77 trillion and keeping Elon Musk in firm control.

item.title: Tesla Stock Tests Short-Term Moving Averages Amid Surging Scandinavian Demand
item.description: Tesla Inc stock slid on Monday as investors weighed near-term stock pressure against signs that the electric-vehicle maker is recovering sales momentum across several European markets. European Registrations Show Recovery Tesla registrations rose in multiple European countries in May, with...

item.title: I just got 2026.14.6.7. FSD is still v14.3.3. Maybe just some bug fixes. Anyone else get this
item.description: submitted by /u/SUPER-NIINTENDO [link] [comments]

item.title: What's justifying SpaceX's $2T valuation target ahead of IPO?
item.description: According to Reuters, SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is gunning for an IPO date of Friday, June 12, with hopes to begin trading on the Nasdaq at $135 per share. This could launch the value of Elon Musk's private space operator to $2 trillion. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Pras Subramanian lays out the most va...

item.title: Used Cybertrucks are in demand, but that won't move Tesla stock
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) first official Cybertruck inventory sold out in 24 hours. Barron's associate editor Al Root explains why and addresses whether the Cybertruck has any bearing on Tesla's stock.

item.title: Tesla piggybacks recent Supercharger feature with update that takes it further
item.description: Tesla has introduced an enhanced visualization in its Supercharger navigation system, building directly on the Site Maps feature rolled out a few months ago. This latest software update adds detailed 3D icons that represent specific vehicle models parked at charging stalls, offering drivers a mor...

item.title: Tesla’s Japan Bet Pays Off — 1,996 Vehicle Registrations Mark 182% Jump In May
item.description: The rise in registrations underscores Tesla’s accelerating momentum in a market long dominated by domestic giants like Toyota, Honda, and Nissan.

item.title: Exclusive-Uber's commitment to self-driving startup Nuro is close to $500 million, sources say
item.description: Uber has committed close to half a billion dollars in self-driving startup Nuro, two sources directly aware of the matter told Reuters, detailing the ‌extent of a major investment by the ride-hailing company in developing commercial robotaxis. Uber has ​been positioning itself as a platform for t...

item.title: Tesla launches robotaxi service in Austin, accelerating autonomous vehicle push AI
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla announced Wednesday the launch of its unsupervised robotaxis across the Austin Metro area, accelerating the company’s push into autonomous ride-hailing.

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14.3.3 driver monitoring: We tested it
item.description: Tesla Full Self-Driving v14.3.3 driver monitoring was reportedly scaled back in recent releases, but a new version that was released in the early hours of June 3 aimed to do a better job of keeping those in control of their cars honest, according to release notes. The release notes for FSD v14.3....

item.title: Tesla expands Austin robotaxi zone to entire metro area
item.description: The geofence now covers the entire Austin metro, but the active unsupervised fleet has shrunk to around 20 vehicles

item.title: Elon Musk-Led Tesla's Former AI Trainers Do Not Trust Its Self-Driving Tech, Safety Data: Repor
item.description: Tesla Inc.‘s former data labelers and engineers do not trust the EV giant’s self-driving system as well as its safety data, according to a Reuters investigation released on Thursday. Doubts Over System’s Safety The news agency conducted interviews with over...

item.title: 2 Autonomous Vehicle Stocks Analysts Think Can Surge Higher
item.description: Autonomous vehicles have gained prominence in recent years as advances in AI technology have brought true self-driving cars closer to reality. Companies such as Tesla and Waymo have been deploying autonomous vehicles on public roads, while pilot programs and commercial services continue expanding...

item.title: Used Cybertrucks Are Selling Fast, but This Is Tesla’s Most Important Model
item.description: Tesla has sold about 63,000 Cybertrucks in the U.S. since its launch in November 2023. Tesla took in hundreds of thousands of preorders for new trucks.

item.title: Tesla expands ‘Robotaxi’ to entire Austin metro — but still has only ~20 vehicles
item.description: Tesla announced today that its unsupervised “Robotaxi” service now covers the entire Austin metro area, a significant expansion of its geofenced operating zone. It’s a notable milestone on paper, but the actual fleet serving this massive area remains tiny — just ~20 active unsupervised vehicles, ...

item.title: Tesla responds to Robotaxi skeptics with a massive move in Austin
item.description: Tesla has responded to the skeptics of its Robotaxi program by launching a massive expansion of the unsupervised program in its initial rollout city of Austin. The company’s geofence, the enabled area of operation for rides, now covers the entire Austin Metropolitan area, an incredible move just ...

item.title: Tesla rolls out unsupervised robotaxis in Austin
item.description: Tesla said on Wednesday it was rolling out its unsupervised robotaxis ‌in the Austin Metro area in Texas, ‌as the electric-vehicle maker looks to speed up its autonomous ​ride-hailing operation. Expanding the robotaxi service and wider adoption of its full self-driving software - a version of whi...

item.title: Tesla just delivered one of its strongest China updates in months
item.description: Shanghai Deliveries Point To Firmer May Demand Momentum

item.title: Tesla Registrations Surge 655% In France: What Prediction Markets Say It Means For TSLA
item.description: Elon Musk’s Tesla Inc. saw French car registrations surge 655% in May to 5,446 vehicles, the latest sign of European recovery for an EV maker that lost nearly half its market share there last year. The headline number comes with...

item.title: Is Tesla's FSD Supervised Gaining Momentum Across Europe?
item.description: TSLA's FSD Supervised gains approval in Estonia, its third EU market, as mutual-recognition rules help speed the driver-assist rollout.

item.title: SpaceX IPO Price Would Put Musk Just Shy of Trillionaire Status
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- The world might have to wait a little longer for its first trillionaire. Most Read from BloombergTrump Begins Rebuilding His Tariff Wall, Citing Forced LaborRussia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is UnaffordableTrump to Get Audit Immunity as $1.8 Billion Fund in DoubtTikT...

item.title: SpaceX Is About to IPO. History Says a 55% Stock Drop Could Be Coming Next.
item.description: While SpaceX’s anticipated public debut has Wall Street salivating over what could be the most consequential IPO in a decade, the historical record offers a sobering warning. The company filed its S-1 in May, outlining three business segments: Space (Falcon and Starship launch services), Connecti...

item.title: Here Are The Latest Odds That Elon Musk Will Merge Tesla And SpaceX
item.description: Multiple analysts believe a merger between Tesla and SpaceX will happen eventually. Tesla stock was up on Wednesday morning.

item.title: Tesla Has Been Selling the World's Most Efficient EVs for Years, But Rivian May Have Just Unseated It
item.description: It's official: Rivian's R2 SUV matches Tesla's industry-leading efficiency and beats Model Y on range.

item.title: Does Tesla's Improving Europe Story Change the Investment Thesis?
item.description: TSLA's Europe registrations are rebounding fast, but the stock's case still hinges on robotaxis, AI and Optimus as capex rises.

item.title: SpaceX IPO Could Trigger $30 Trillion Worth Of 401(k), Retirement Money To Buy SPCX As Dan Ives Predicts Tesla Merger In 2027
item.description: Elon Musk-led SpaceX‘s upcoming IPO could trigger retirement funds, including 401 (k) accounts, worth trillions to invest in the commercial space flight giant following its June public listing. $30 Trillion Worth Of Retirement Funds In a post on X on...

item.title: How Much Longer Can Musk's Vision Support Tesla's 400x P/E?
BYD Taps A State-Backed Company To Help Compete With Tesla In China
item.description: BYD tapped the Chinese state-backed company, Sinopec, to help it build a larger charging network than Tesla.

item.title: Tesla retroactively added ‘supervised’ to FSD contracts owners signed years ago
item.description: Tesla has retroactively modified “Full Self-Driving” purchase agreements to add “supervised” language that did not exist when owners originally bought the product. In some cases, the original documents have been made entirely inaccessible. Electrek has confirmed the issue with multiple owners.

item.title: Tesla And SpaceX Merger By 2027? Here's Why Wedbush Believes Odds Have Jumped Above 80%
item.description: Wedbush highlighted several developments that it believes are bringing Tesla and SpaceX into closer alignment, including the EV giant’s $2 billion investment in SPCX.

item.title: The SpaceX IPO: 3 of the Biggest Risks to Consider
item.description: SpaceX's growth story may be captivating, but there are also some significant risks that come with the stock that investors should be wary of.

item.title: Tesla Investors Finally Get A Benchmark For The Musk Premium
item.description: For years, Tesla Inc. investors have argued about one question that has never had a clear answer: How much of Tesla’s valuation belongs to Elon Musk? The debate has become increasingly important as Tesla’s market value has grown far beyond...

item.title: Tesla Faces China FSD Lawsuit As Robotics And Valuation Risks Grow
item.description: Chinese consumers have filed a new class-action lawsuit against Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) alleging fraudulent marketing and consumer deception related to its Full Self-Driving feature in China. The case targets Tesla's largest international market and raises questions around how the company presents ...

item.title: Will Tesla Merge With SpaceX?
item.description: The possibility is more likely than one might think.

item.title: Tesla found new buyers for its Cybertruck: Kazakh emergency services
item.description: Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Emergency Situations has confirmed it will purchase additional Tesla Cybertrucks after the electric pickup proved effective in rescue operations in Almaty, the country’s largest city. The Central Asian country has become the latest small international market to adopt the ...

item.title: SpaceX Seeks $135 a Share for $75 Billion IPO, Reuters Says
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX aims to sell 555.6 million shares ​at $135 apiece for its record-breaking $75 ​billion ⁠initial public ​offering, Reuters reported, citing an unidentified person familiar with the matter. Most Read from BloombergRussia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is Unaffordabl...

item.title: Trump Criticized Canada's China EV Deal—Elon Musk's Tesla Could Be Among Its Biggest Winners
item.description: Tesla Inc. could be reaping the benefits of the China-Canada EV agreement despite earlier criticism from President Donald Trump following the deal. Tesla Accounts For More Than 10% Of Chinese Imports According to a report by Drive Tesla Canada on...

item.title: Tesla improves Dashcam playback with awesome addition
item.description: Tesla has improved Dashcam playback with an awesome new addition, as the company has launched a web-based version that is potentially easier to navigate and operate. The tool is available at dashcam.tesla.com and will be enabled as your vehicle receives the 2026.20 Software Version. Clips that ar...

item.title: Tesla’s IPO Was One of the Greatest Ever. Why SpaceX Can’t Hope to Repeat Its Success.
item.description: Tesla stock bounced on Tuesday as CEO Elon Musk reminded investors about where his EV company started and how far it’s come. Don’t expect SpaceX to follow the same trajectory even as Musk tries to justify SpaceX’s valuation. The move came after Musk tweeted that Tesla’s IPO market cap was only 0...

item.title: Tesla bull drops blunt take on gold rival
item.description: Tesla bull Ross Gerber just took a sharp swing at Bitcoin (BTC). This comes at a time when "king crypto" has slipped below its $70,000 mark for the first time since April, while its rival, gold, continues to hold the fort in green. Gerber is the co-founder and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth ...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving attempts 150-mile stress test: the good and the bad
item.description: I recently took my Tesla Model Y running Full Self-Driving (Supervised) v14.3.3 over 150 miles on the Pennsylvania Turnpike in an effort to truly put the system under a stress test. There were a lot of good moments, and some bad, but overall, Full Self-Driving impressed me. Last Thursday, I decid...

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Concerns Under Texas SB 2807
Is Tesla's Model Y Driving a Lasting Recovery in Europe?
item.description: TSLA's European rebound accelerates in May as registrations surge across key markets, led by record France sales and strong Model Y demand.

item.title: Palantir, XAI, PayPal, and Robinhood stock analysis
item.description: Shay Boloor, chief market strategist at Futurum, breaks down Palantir's strong earnings report and future guidance. He also analyzes Elon Musk's decision to merge XAI and SpaceX, and the implications for Tesla shareholders. Finally, Balor offers insights into the struggles of PayPal and the poten...

item.title: Tesla Gets A Rival To Its Robotics Business, As Sales In China Eye A Recovery
item.description: Tesla stock fell more than 4.5% on Monday after OpenAI appeared to revive its robotics business. On Tuesday, the stock recovered slightly, in part due to promising deliveries from its factory in Shanghai.

item.title: Tesla robotaxi fleet in Texas reaches only 42 vehicles
item.description: submitted by /u/mountaineer [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Semi tackles the Grapevine with a loaded trailer, leaves fleet operator ‘amazed’
item.description: Covenant Logistics, one of the largest trucking companies in the US with a fleet of over 2,600 tractors, completed a two-week evaluation of the Tesla Semi in California — including a loaded run over the notorious Grapevine pass on I-5. The company’s VP of Sustainability and Innovation, Matt McLel...
